FOUR REGIONAL AWARDS PROGRAMMES / ONE GLOBAL CELEBRATION
ABOUT

AHEAD is the only global awards for hospitality experience and design, organised by industry-leading publication, Sleeper.

2026 entries are now open and tickets for the ceremonies are on sale.


The series celebrates the achievements of those shaping the hospitality design industry each year, hosting regional awards across:

Asia
Americas
MEA (Middle East & Africa)
Europe

2026 AWARDS

AHEAD Asia 2026 is open for entries. Download the entry guidelines and enter now.


The winners will be announced at AHEAD Asia 2026 on Friday 11 September at Pan Pacific Orchard, Singapore. Get tickets now, subject to availability.
